mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transfers ( transfer_id, source_transaction_id, amount_value, currency, target_account, source_account, transfer_type, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{transferId}, #{sourceTransactionId}, #{amountValue}, #{currency}, #{targetAccount}, #{sourceAccount}, #{transferType}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (transfer_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
